function.name: _website_save_resource
function.description: Create or edit website module resource information. When creating resources, do not actively generate id; when editing resources, you must first call _website_query_resource to get the real id. If a single file content exceeds 300 lines or 8000 characters, it must be actively split into multiple files.

id.description: Resource ID. Can be empty when adding, cannot be empty when editing.

name.description: Resource name. File name, such as index.html, main.css, app.js. It is recommended to use lowercase English letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores for naming.

parentId.description: Parent directory ID. Empty means placing in the website root directory.
